select_when: Complexity is real but attention is scarce, so the challenge is to preserve the core signal without overloading the audience.
The same decision keeps failing because of message shape, sequencing, or framing rather than because the underlying content is false.
The communicator must decide what not to say so the core meaning survives limited working memory.
The work needs stronger pruning, ordering, and packaging because the current explanation is accurate but not operationally usable.
avoid_when: The model is being used to optimize compression so aggressively that decision-critical nuance disappears.
The issue is not signal packaging but disagreement about reality, incentives, or causal structure, and cleaner formatting is being treated as a substitute for solving that deeper problem.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the model centered on signal preservation, pruning, and sequencing rather than on broad communication-theory survey material.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor presentation-sprawl because the raw source is already strongest on message shaping, pruning, and working-memory-aware structure.
Did not add higher-order fields because this batch stays inside the frozen Wave 1 to Wave 3 contracts.
open_questions: The second avoid-when line is reviewed normalization over a source that is stronger on anti-oversimplification than on explicit anti-activation routing.

select_when.note: The raw source is explicit that information theory is strongest when complexity must be made actionable without losing the core signal.

avoid_when.note: The oversimplification boundary is explicit in the source; the second anti-activation line is conservative reviewed normalization.

input_type.note: The raw source activates on message-shape and signal-preservation problems, but the compact input label is reviewed normalization.

output_type.note: The source yields pruned, structured signal packaging; the output label compresses that into a typed artifact.

reasoning_types.note: Information theory here works through disciplined structuring and reflective packaging choices, but the taxonomy labels remain reviewed normalization.
